mapper.select: SELECT ma.*, u.name as uploader_name FROM minute_attachments ma LEFT JOIN users u ON ma.uploader_id = u.id WHERE ma.id = #{id}
SELECT ma.*, u.name as uploader_name FROM minute_attachments ma LEFT JOIN users u ON ma.uploader_id = u.id WHERE ma.minute_id = #{minuteId} ORDER BY ma.created_time DESC
SELECT ma.*, u.name as uploader_name FROM minute_attachments ma LEFT JOIN users u ON ma.uploader_id = u.id WHERE ma.version_id = #{versionId} ORDER BY ma.created_time DESC
SELECT ma.*, u.name as uploader_name FROM minute_attachments ma LEFT JOIN users u ON ma.uploader_id = u.id WHERE ma.uploader_id = #{uploaderId} ORDER BY ma.created_time DESC
SELECT ma.*, u.name as uploader_name FROM minute_attachments ma LEFT JOIN users u ON ma.uploader_id = u.id ORDER BY ma.created_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO minute_attachments (id, minute_id, version_id, file_name, file_size, file_type, file_path, uploader_id, created_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{minuteId}, #{versionId}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{filePath}, #{uploaderId}, #{createdTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE minute_attachments SET uploader_id = NULL WHERE uploader_id = #{uploaderId}
